title: callicarpa dichotoma
intro: Callicarpa dichotoma, also known as the purple passion plant or Mexican plume, is a flowering plant species native to eastern Asia and Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Callicarpa dichotoma can be prepared as a tincture, tea, or infused oil for its herbal applications.
